name: Crusher Hole Day Use Area (San Juan River)
notes: Downstream end of the 3.75-mile Special Trout Waters; Navajo Lake State Park day-use pass required.

name: San Juan River trail / day-use areas (Navajo Lake State Park)
notes: River trail and parking lots along the quality waters; parks day pass.

name: Hammond Tract Fishing Access (lower San Juan)
notes: NMDGF fishing access tract near Blanco; coordinates approximate.

name: Pecos Canyon State Park (Pecos River)
notes: Day-use and camping areas along the upper Pecos north of Pecos village.

name: Villanueva State Park (Pecos River)
notes: Bank access on the lower Pecos winter trout water; park day-use fee.
